title: S + V + N + which/that + S + V（受格省略）

formulas.formula: N + which/that + S + V (受格關係代名詞作受詞)
formulas.zh: 名詞 + 關係代名詞 + 主詞 + 動詞...（關係代名詞作受詞時可省略）

formulas.formula: N + (which/that) + S + V (省略受格關係代名詞)
formulas.zh: 名詞 + 省略關係代名詞 + 主詞 + 動詞...（受詞位置省略仍可理解）

explanation: 受格關係代名詞（which/that）在關係子句中作受詞時，可以省略。省略後主詞和動詞仍然存在，句子結構完整。例如「The book which/that I read」可簡化為「The book I read」。但若關係代名詞作主詞時絕不可省略，例如「The book which is on the table」不能省略which。這是高中英文的重要區別點，常見於學測題目。

examples.eng: The movie (that) we watched last weekend was very exciting.
examples.chi: 我們上週末看的那部電影非常令人興奮。

examples.eng: All the students (whom) the teacher praised have made great progress.
examples.chi: 所有被老師表揚的學生都取得了很大的進步。

examples.eng: The technology (which) scientists developed has changed our lives.
examples.chi: 科學家開發的這項技術改變了我們的生活。

examples.eng: This is the method (that) experts recommend for solving the problem.
examples.chi: 這是專家推薦用來解決問題的方法。

extension.tip: 判斷關係代名詞能否省略的關鍵：檢查關係代名詞在子句中的角色。若是受詞可省略；若是主詞（後面直接跟動詞）則不可省略。省略後應仍能清楚看出主詞和動詞。

examples.test: The book which is on the table（which作主詞）
examples.result: → 不能省略，✗ The book is on the table（意思改變）

examples.test: The book which I read（which作受詞）
examples.result: → 可以省略，✓ The book I read（意思相同）

examples.test: The person whom we met（whom作受詞）
examples.result: → 可以省略，✓ The person we met（受詞位置被省略）

extension.note: 受詞可省，主詞不可省；若關係代名詞後直接有主詞和動詞，則此代名詞作受詞，可省略。

parts: the museum owns is worth millions of dollars.
exercises.sentence: The painting (that/which) the museum owns is worth millions of dollars.
exercises.translation: 博物館擁有的這幅畫價值數百萬美元。

parts: you submitted have been reviewed by the manager.
exercises.sentence: All the documents (that/which) you submitted have been reviewed by the manager.
exercises.translation: 你提交的所有文件都已被經理審查。

parts: they gained from the project was invaluable.
exercises.sentence: The experience (that/which) they gained from the project was invaluable.
exercises.translation: 他們從這個專案中獲得的經驗是無價的。

parts: the company implemented has proven very effective.
exercises.sentence: The strategy (that/which) the company implemented has proven very effective.
exercises.translation: 公司實施的這項策略已被證明非常有效。
